progress.oauth: ### Authentication required, please open the following URL and log in to Heiman Smart Home: {link_left}Click here to login{link_right} If the code is not automatically copied, please paste the following code to authorize the integration: {link}(You will be automatically redirected to the next page after successful login)

auth_config.description:
### Login Region
Select the region of your Heiman account.
### Language
Select the language for device and entity names. Some sentences without translation will be displayed in English.
### OAuth2 Redirect URL
The OAuth2 authentication redirect address is **[http://homeassistant.local:8123](http://homeassistant.local:8123)**. Home Assistant needs to be in the same local area network as your current operating terminal (e.g., personal computer) and the terminal can access the Home Assistant home page through this address. Otherwise, login authentication may fail.
### Notes
- For users with hundreds or more Heiman devices, the first integration setup will take some time. Please be patient.
- If Home Assistant is running in a Docker environment, please ensure Docker network mode is set to host, otherwise local control functionality may be affected.
auth_config.title: Authentication Configuration

confirm.title: Confirm Configuration

data.eula: I am aware of above risks and willing to voluntarily assume any risks associated with use of the integration.

eula.description:
1. Your Heiman user information and device information will be stored in Home Assistant system. **Heiman cannot guarantee security of Home Assistant storage mechanism**. You are responsible for preventing your information from being stolen.
2. This integration is maintained by open-source community. There may be stability issues or other problems. When encountering issues or bugs of this integration, **you should seek help from open-source community rather than contacting Heiman customer service**.
3. You need some technical ability to maintain your local operating environment. The integration is not user-friendly for beginners.
4. Please read README file before starting.
eula.title: Risk Notice

select_home.description:
## Room Name Sync Mode
When syncing devices from Heiman APP to Home Assistant, the naming of areas in Home Assistant will follow these rules. Note that the syncing process does not change the home and room settings in Heiman APP.

- **Do not sync**: Devices will not be added to any area.
- **Room name**: The area where devices are added will be named after the room name.
- **Home name**: The area where devices are added will be named after the home name.
- **Home name and Room name**: The area where devices are added will be named with a combination of home name and room name.

### Notes
- For users with hundreds or more Heiman devices, the first integration setup will take some time. Please be patient.
- If Home Assistant is running in a Docker environment, please ensure Docker network mode is set to host, otherwise local control functionality may be affected.
select_home.title: Select Homes and Devices

fail.content: Authentication failed: {error_msg}. Please close this page and try again.
fail.title: Authentication Failed

success.content: Authentication was successful. Please close this page and return to Home Assistant to continue.
success.title: Authentication Successful
